details.detail: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected per MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md (PROFITABILITY_COCKPIT.md route, 30d review outputs). All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python files (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py, __init__.py, agents/). Moltbot was deprecated and should not be reintroduced per governance policy.

Moltbot references found in code/config: moltbot/ directory (5+ .py files), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
